projectDescription: A full-stack sales management platform for Yakult distributors, featuring a React Native (Expo) mobile app and an Express/MySQL REST backend for managing products, clients, orders, delivery staff, and PDF sales reports.
keyFeatures: Role-based access control with Master, Promotor, and Repartidor roles
Full product catalog management with SKU, stock tracking, and categories
Client management with active/inactive status and search/filter
Order lifecycle management from Pending → In Transit → Delivered
Delivery driver assignment with in-app push notifications
WhatsApp integration for customer order status notifications
Filterable sales reports with date ranges, clients, products, vendors, and grouping (day/week/month/year)
PDF export and printable HTML report generation via PDFKit
Real-time dashboard with product, client, order, and stock summaries
JWT-based authentication with bcrypt password hashing (30-day tokens)
Auto-migration database schema on server startup
React Native (Expo) cross-platform mobile app with tab-based navigation
publicApiSurface: POST /api/auth/registro — Register a new user (role auto-assigned by email domain)
GET /api/ordenes — List all orders with line items
POST /api/ordenes — Create an order (transactional stock deduction)
PUT /api/notificaciones/leer-todas — Mark all notifications as read
GET /api/reportes/opciones — Filter options (clients, products, categories, vendors)
POST /api/reportes/ventas — Generate and save a sales report
